title: Crypto Ai Trading
author: fikabonds
selftext:
Im working on a ai system and have now achieved 1048% ROO during a 6 month backtest, this is currently based on 100% ruled based system until I get the ML setup live.

How good is this ROI compared to other ai systems?

Im new to this.

comments.author: FairFlowAI
comments.body:
If your AI strategy works within real markets as well, and brings you 100% over a year period, you have enough reasons being happy ;-) …everything more, see it as a bonus! 

Do you have a go to market strategy? Sim account first to protect your capital?

Keep us posted

replies.author: fikabonds
replies.body:
I built the backtest enviroment few days ago and been testing the bot. It will be interesting how it holds up
IRL.

Yes ill be going using testnet with the rule based system only but ill be logging the data to train the ML and correöate it with thr sentiment and market predicition system im working on.

replies.body: sounds like a plan 🍀 keep us posted 🍀
